summary: Added a read-only doctor/--doctor envelope to blocker-fail-escalator.sh so the FAIL-path blocker escalation hook exposes prerequisites without evaluating acceptance conditions, incrementing counters, appending escalation rows, or sending Agent Mail.

proof.summary: 26/0 including doctor read-only envelope, --doctor alias, pass/reset path, below-threshold fail path, threshold escalation, dry-run no-mutation, mismatch, override, scan, and multiline capture.
doctor_subcommand_status moved to basic; canonical_cli_scoping_status remains partial; mutates_state=yes; ownership=own.

boundaries: Doctor mode does not evaluate acceptance_condition commands.
Doctor mode does not increment or reset fail counters.
Doctor mode appends no escalation rows.
Doctor mode sends no Agent Mail.
Mutation remains gated by existing --apply behavior.
Canonical CLI scoping remains separately classified as partial; this closeout is limited to doctor-mode gap reduction.
